overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at dusk. The scene features futuristic architecture with massive digital billboards, a covered metro walkway with dynamically color-changing neon lights, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a rain-slicked urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered metro walkway with color-changing glass canopy

events.description: canopy lighting shifts from green to intense pink/magenta
canopy lighting transitions from pink to blue/cyan

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered metro walkway, passing vending machines and concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the adjacent multi-lane road

entered.detail: futuristic covered pedestrian walkway with angled support columns
glass roof structure with dynamic LED lighting cycling through green, yellow, and pink hues
futuristic station entrance with glowing signage
yellow and gray striped barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a covered metro walkway with a dramatic color-changing glass canopy overhead. The lighting cycles through green, yellow, and pink tones, casting colored reflections on the wet pavement. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction while vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open street crossing

events.description: exits the covered metro walkway and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: exits the covered walkway and crosses the street toward the opposite sidewalk with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: dark sports car passing through the intersection as pedestrians cross

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' advertisement with red text
large billboard displaying 'ALL FOODS' corporate advertisement
yellow metal railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into the open street, crossing toward the opposite side dominated by massive digital billboards. The metro structure moves to the right background as the character crosses the asphalt road, with vehicles passing by and the lighting shifting from neon-dominated to mixed natural dusk and artificial city glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown sidewalk with towering digital advertisements

events.description: slight turn to follow the sidewalk curve while passing the diner entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing massive corporate billboards and futuristic storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: bright orange neon sign reading 'DINER' on the building facade
continuous yellow safety railing separating pedestrian walkway from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open downtown sidewalk, the character passes the glowing diner sign and continues past massive digital billboards advertising various corporations. The covered metro structure falls behind as the street opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers with enormous vertical displays. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the wide concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital facades

events.description: crossing the yellow-grid intersection as vehicles wait and pedestrians flow across

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a major intersection while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and advertisements

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with 'KIROSHI' branding and Japanese text on upper levels
yellow painted grid pattern marking the pedestrian crosswalk
large red neon sign reading 'BOHEMIA' on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital advertisements. The crowd density increases as the character approaches a major intersection marked by yellow grid crosswalk patterns. Looking up reveals the immense scale of the futuristic architecture with floating vehicles visible between buildings, while pedestrians and cars navigate the busy crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit transit corridor into the overwhelming scale of a dense futuristic urban canyon. It begins beneath a covered metro walkway where a glass canopy cycles through green, yellow, and pink tones, casting vibrant reflections onto the rain-slicked pavement. As the character exits the shelter, the scene shifts from these concentrated neon hues to a mix of natural dusk and artificial glow while crossing an asphalt road toward a skyline of massive digital billboards. The camera then moves along an open downtown sidewalk, passing a glowing diner sign as the metro structure recedes and the environment expands to reveal towering skyscrapers with enormous vertical displays. Finally, the path leads into a crowded intersection marked by yellow grid crosswalks, where the perspective tilts upward to reveal floating vehicles navigating the immense gap between skyscrapers covered in corporate advertisements.
